name: TD Combo Countdown — v1b
description: All v1 rules apply, with an additional condition requiring successively higher true highs for each sell countdown bar and successively lower true lows for each buy countdown bar

additional_condition.description: The true low of each countdown bar must be successively lower than the true low of the previous countdown bar
The true high of each countdown bar must be successively higher than the true high of the previous countdown bar
